testcase.name: Successful Appointment Booking - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the Cura login page........................................passed When User enters username "John Doe" and password "ThisIsNotAPassword"......passed And clicks on the Login button..............................................passed Then User should be redirected to the Make Appointment page.................passed When User selects facility "Tokyo CURA Healthcare Center"...................passed And checks "Apply for hospital readmission".................................passed And selects healthcare program "Medicaid"...................................passed And picks appointment date "30/05/2025".....................................passed And adds comment "Checkup appointment"......................................passed And clicks the Book Appointment button......................................passed Then Appointment confirmation should be displayed...........................passed And User clicks on the Menu and selects Logout..............................passed Then User should be redirected to the homepage..............................passed

testcase.name: Failed Appointment Booking - Missing Required Fields - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the Cura login page........................................passed When User enters username "John Doe" and password "ThisIsNotAPassword"......passed And clicks on the Login button..............................................passed Then User should be redirected to the Make Appointment page.................passed When User selects facility "Tokyo CURA Healthcare Center"...................passed And checks "Apply for hospital readmission".................................passed And leaves healthcare program unselected....................................passed And picks appointment date "30/05/2025".....................................passed And clicks the Book Appointment button......................................passed Then Error message should be displayed indicating required fields are missing.passed
